description: Code with unclosed file handles, leaked event listeners, and accumulated timers

issues.question: Q16
issues.description: createReadStream opened in try block but not closed in catch — file handle leaks on error path
issues.expected_fix: close stream in finally block or use try-finally pattern

issues.question: Q16
issues.description: addEventListener called without corresponding removeEventListener — event listener accumulates on re-calls
issues.expected_fix: return cleanup function that calls removeEventListener

issues.question: Q16
issues.description: setInterval called without storing ID or clearing — timer accumulates on repeated calls
issues.expected_fix: store interval ID and call clearInterval in cleanup/teardown

false_positive_traps: Line 10: fetchWithCleanup properly closes connection in finally block — not a leak
